hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】美联储古尔斯比表示，他担心“令人担忧但激烈”的气候下的通胀；【CRYPTO】以下是美国国债如何影响特朗普的伊朗战争和比特币走势；【FINANCE】美联储理事沃勒敦促目前保持谨慎，称今年晚些时候可能降息。

items.title: Fed's Goolsbee says he's worried about inflation in 'fraught but intense' climate
items.summary: In a CNBC interview, the central banker said policymaking is difficult in the current environment.
items.title_zh: 美联储古尔斯比表示，他担心“令人担忧但激烈”的气候下的通胀
items.summary_zh: 这位央行行长在接受 CNBC 采访时表示，在当前环境下制定政策很困难。

items.title: Here’s how Treasuries could shape Trump’s Iran war and bitcoin moves
items.summary: Treasury yields and swap spreads could eventually pressure the Trump administration to moderate the conflict, analysts argue.
items.title_zh: 以下是美国国债如何影响特朗普的伊朗战争和比特币走势
items.summary_zh: 分析师认为，美国国债收益率和掉期利差最终可能会迫使特朗普政府缓和冲突。

items.title: Fed Governor Waller urges caution for now, says rate cuts possible later in the year
items.summary: Waller said in a CNBC interview that recent developments require a more conservative approach.
items.title_zh: 美联储理事沃勒敦促目前保持谨慎，称今年晚些时候可能降息
items.summary_zh: 沃勒在接受 CNBC 采访时表示，最近的事态发展需要采取更加保守的做法。

items.title: Sidelined by War With Iran, Gaza Residents Remain in Limbo
items.summary: The new war has led to panic buying and a surge in food prices for Gazans as they try to recover from Israel’s two-year offensive against Hamas.
items.title_zh: 因与伊朗的战争而被边缘化，加沙居民仍处于困境
items.summary_zh: 新的战争导致了加沙人的恐慌性购买和食品价格飙升，因为他们试图从以色列对哈马斯两年的攻势中恢复过来。

items.title: Biotech stock NovaBay jumps 19% amid pivot, rebrand to Stablecoin Development Corporation
items.summary: NovaBay's strategy centers on staking rewards, tying returns to Sky’s governance parameters and participation levels.
items.title_zh: 生物科技股 NovaBay 转型并更名为稳定币开发公司，股价上涨 19%
items.summary_zh: NovaBay 的策略以质押奖励为中心，将回报与 Sky 的治理参数和参与水平挂钩。

items.title: Bitcoin, ether, solana prices move higher as Gulf allies inch toward joining Iran war
items.summary: Crypto recovered on Tuesday morning even as Monday's relief rally unraveled across traditional markets, with oil jumping 4% on reports that Saudi Arabia and the UAE are moving to join the conflict.
items.title_zh: 随着海湾盟友逐步加入伊朗战争，比特币、以太币、solana 价格上涨
items.summary_zh: 尽管传统市场周一的缓解性反弹已经瓦解，但加密货币在周二上午有所恢复，因有报道称沙特阿拉伯和阿联酋将加入冲突，油价上涨 4%。

items.title: Strategy tops up capital-raising plans, bringing potential bitcoin buying power back to $42 billion
items.summary: Expanded share issuance plans and new Wall Street partners boost capital raising firepower.
items.title_zh: 战略补充融资计划，使潜在的比特币购买力恢复至 420 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 扩大股票发行计划和新的华尔街合作伙伴增强了融资火力。

items.title: Balancer Labs to shut down after $128 million exploit; protocol eyes ‘lean’ restructuring
items.summary: Its co-founder, Fernando Martinelli, said the protocol will continue to operate after restructuring to attain a 'lean' economic model.
items.title_zh: Balancer Labs 在遭受 1.28 亿美元的攻击后将关闭；协议着眼于“精益”重组
items.summary_zh: 其联合创始人费尔南多·马丁内利表示，该协议将在重组后继续运营，以实现“精益”经济模式。

items.title: Equipping workers with insights about compensation
items.summary: New research shows Americans send nearly 3 million daily messages to ChatGPT asking about compensation and earnings, helping close the wage information gap.
items.title_zh: 为员工提供有关薪酬的见解
items.summary_zh: 新研究显示，美国人每天向 ChatGPT 发送近 300 万条消息，询问薪酬和收入，这有助于缩小工资信息差距。

items.title: Apollo gives investors only 45% of requested withdrawals from $15 billion private credit fund
items.summary: The withdrawals show that Apollo didn't avoid the rush of investor redemptions plaguing rivals, driven by concern over private credit loans to software firms.
items.title_zh: Apollo 仅向投资者提供 150 亿美元私人信贷基金提款请求的 45%
items.summary_zh: 这些撤资表明，由于对软件公司私人信贷贷款的担忧，阿波罗并没有避免困扰竞争对手的投资者赎回潮。

items.title: Volume in stock and oil futures surged minutes before Trump's market-turning post
items.summary: The timing of the earlier volume spikes — across both equities and crude — caught the attention of traders.
items.title_zh: 在特朗普发表扭转市场的言论前几分钟，股票和石油期货成交量激增
items.summary_zh: 股票和原油早期成交量飙升的时机引起了交易员的注意。

items.title: BlackRock’s Larry Fink warns against market timing, says missing best days can halve returns
items.summary: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink said staying invested through periods of turmoil has historically delivered far stronger returns.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德 (BlackRock) 的拉里·芬克 (Larry Fink) 对市场时机发出警告，称错过最佳时机可能会使回报减半
items.summary_zh: 贝莱德首席执行官拉里·芬克表示，从历史上看，在动荡时期保持投资会带来更强劲的回报。

items.title: SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce on ETFs: 'We want to work with people on new products'
items.summary: SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce indicates an openness to work with Wall Street on fresh exchange-traded fund products tied to cryptocurrencies and tokenization.
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会委员 Hester Peirce 谈 ETF：“我们希望与人们合作开发新产品”
items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会委员 Hester Peirce 表示愿意与华尔街合作开发与加密货币和代币化相关的新交易所交易基金产品。

items.title: Copper joins gold in broad commodities sell-off. There's a worrying reason behind it
items.summary: After major rallies, metals were under pressure on Thursday as rising oil prices increased both inflation and growth worries.
items.title_zh: 铜与黄金一起遭遇大宗商品抛售。背后有一个令人担忧的原因
items.summary_zh: 在大幅上涨之后，由于油价上涨加剧了通胀和增长担忧，金属周四面临压力。

items.title: Ultimatums, diplomacy and a trip to Graceland as Trump eyes a deal with Iran
items.summary: America may be a nation at war, but the president's activities have been a mix of diplomacy and diversions - with the occasional swing toward the surreal.
items.title_zh: 特朗普考虑与伊朗达成协议，最后通牒、外交和格雷斯兰之旅
items.summary_zh: 美国可能是一个处于战争状态的国家，但总统的活动是外交和消遣的混合体——偶尔会走向超现实。

items.title: Oil falls and shares rebound after Trump says talks have been held to end war
items.summary: Energy prices fall and stock markets rebound after the US president says "very good and productive" talks have been held.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称已举行结束战争谈判后油价下跌，股市反弹
items.summary_zh: 在美国总统表示举行了“非常良好且富有成效”的会谈后，能源价格下跌，股市反弹。

items.title: Caught Between Two Conflicts, Afghans Flee Iran
items.summary: The war in Iran is choking off Afghanistan’s main economic lifeline and has forced at least 70,000 Afghan workers and students there back home to a nation embroiled in another conflict.
items.title_zh: 陷入两场冲突，阿富汗人逃离伊朗
items.summary_zh: 伊朗战争正在扼杀阿富汗的主要经济命脉，并迫使至少 7 万名阿富汗工人和学生返回陷入另一场冲突的国家。

items.title: Balancer Labs will shut down as corporate entity became 'a liability' after $110 million exploit
items.summary: Co-founder Fernando Martinelli said he considered winding down the entire protocol but decided the team deserved a chance to restructure, with the DAO targeting zero emissions, fee restructuring, and a BAL buyback to offer holders a fair exit.
items.title_zh: Balancer Labs 将关闭，因为公司实体在遭受 1.1 亿美元的攻击后成为“负债”
items.summary_zh: 联合创始人 Fernando Martinelli 表示，他考虑过逐步结束整个协议，但认为团队应该有机会重组，DAO 的目标是零排放、费用重组和 BAL 回购，为持有者提供公平的退出。

items.title: Stablecoin yield in crypto Clarity Act won't allow rewards on balances, latest text says
items.summary: The crypto industry got a first look at legislative language that won't allow rewards on stablecoin balances, and the approach is seen as restrictive.
items.title_zh: 最新文本称，《加密清晰度法案》中的稳定币收益不允许对余额进行奖励
items.summary_zh: 加密行业首次看到立法语言不允许对稳定币余额进行奖励，而且这种方法被认为是具有限制性的。

items.title: Kalshi, Polymarket tighten insider trading controls amid Senate scrutiny
items.summary: US senators recently introduced the 'Prediction Markets Are Gambling Act' to ban sports betting on prediction markets.
items.title_zh: Kalshi、Polymarket 在参议院审查中收紧内幕交易控制
items.summary_zh: 美国参议员最近提出了“预测市场是赌博法案”，禁止在预测市场上进行体育博彩。

items.title: Australian pension fund Hostplus eyes crypto offering for self-directed accounts: Bloomberg
items.summary: Digital asset offerings could arrive as early as next financial year, its executive said, subject to regulatory approval.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚养老基金 Hostplus 着眼于为自助账户提供加密货币服务：彭博社
items.summary_zh: 其高管表示，数字资产产品最早可能在下财年推出，但需获得监管部门的批准。

items.title: Digital asset manager ParaFi raises $125 million for new venture fund: Bloomberg
items.summary: Separately, ParaFi has raised $325 million for its ongoing digital asset investment strategies since the beginning of 2025.
items.title_zh: 数字资产管理公司 ParaFi 为新风险基金筹集 1.25 亿美元：彭博社
items.summary_zh: 另外，自 2025 年初以来，ParaFi 已为其持续的数字资产投资策略筹集了 3.25 亿美元。

items.title: Sen. Warren requests details from MrBeast about its future plans for teens and crypto
items.summary: Sen. Warren is raising concerns about Beast Industries’ acquisition of Step, which allowed minors to invest in cryptocurrency.
items.title_zh: Warren 参议员要求 MrBeast 提供有关青少年和加密货币未来计划的详细信息
items.summary_zh: 沃伦参议员对 Beast Industries 收购 Step 表示担忧，该收购允许未成年人投资加密货币。

items.title: The Daily: Lawmakers move to ban sports betting on prediction markets, Polymarket and Kalshi CEOs back a new $35 million venture fund, and more
items.summary: The following article is adapted from The Block’s newsletter, The Daily, which comes out on weekday afternoons.
items.title_zh: 《每日报》：立法者采取行动禁止预测市场上的体育博彩、Polymarket 和 Kalshi 首席执行官支持新的 3500 万美元风险基金等等
items.summary_zh: 以下文章改编自 The Block 的时事通讯《The Daily》，该通讯于工作日下午发布。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #205.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Akash 网络 (AKT)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 205 位。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 趋势加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #34.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Bittensor (TAO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 34 位。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #455.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：背包 (BP)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#455。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #106.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 106。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Astral
items.summary: Accelerates Codex growth to power the next generation of Python developer tools
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 Astral
items.summary_zh: 加速 Codex 的发展，为下一代 Python 开发工具提供动力

items.title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
items.summary: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
items.title_zh: Rakuten 使用 Codex 解决问题的速度提高了一倍
items.summary_zh: Rakuten 使用 OpenAI 的编码代理 Codex 来更快、更安全地交付软件，将 MTTR 降低 50%，自动化 CI/CD 审查，并在几周内交付全栈构建。

items.title: MIT and Hasso Plattner Institute establish collaborative hub for AI and creativity
items.summary: Jointly led by the MIT Morningside Academy for Design, MIT Schwarzman College of Computing, and the Hasso Plattner Institute in Potsdam, the hub will foster a dynamic community where computing, creativity, and human-centered innovation meet.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院和哈索普拉特纳研究所建立人工智能和创造力合作中心
items.summary_zh: 该中心由麻省理工学院晨兴设计学院、麻省理工学院施瓦茨曼计算学院和波茨坦哈索·普拉特纳研究所联合领导，将培育一个充满活力的社区，让计算、创造力和以人为本的创新相遇。

items.title: Generative AI improves a wireless vision system that sees through obstructions
items.summary: With this new technique, a robot could more accurately detect hidden objects or understand an indoor scene using reflected Wi-Fi signals.
items.title_zh: 生成式人工智能改进了无线视觉系统，可以穿透障碍物
items.summary_zh: 借助这项新技术，机器人可以使用反射的 Wi-Fi 信号更准确地检测隐藏物体或了解室内场景。

items.title: Can AI help predict which heart-failure patients will worsen within a year?
items.summary: Researchers at MIT, Mass General Brigham, and Harvard Medical School developed a deep-learning model to forecast a patient’s heart failure prognosis up to a year in advance.
items.title_zh: 人工智能能否帮助预测哪些心力衰竭患者会在一年内病情恶化？
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院、麻省总医院和哈佛医学院的研究人员开发了一种深度学习模型，可以提前一年预测患者的心力衰竭预后。

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 02/23/2026
items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Monday, 02/23/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Evaluating Reversal Potential in Niche Alternative ETFs [Quantpedia] Alternative ETFs sit at an unusual intersection of pub
items.title_zh: 截至 2026 年 2 月 23 日，来自 Quantocracy 的最新量化链接
items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 2 月 23 日星期一 Quantocracy 上最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！评估利基另类 ETF 的逆转潜力 [Quantpedia] 另类 ETF 位于酒吧的一个不寻常的交叉点

items.title: Bitcoin's mining concentration just showed up in a rare 2-block reorg
items.summary: A 2-block reorg at height 941,881 saw Foundry's chain overwrite blocks from AntPool and ViaBTC, coming days after mining difficulty dropped nearly 8%.
items.title_zh: 比特币的挖矿集中度刚刚在罕见的 2 区块重组中显现出来
items.summary_zh: 在挖矿难度下降近 8% 的几天后，在高度 941,881 的 2 块重组中，Foundry 的链覆盖了 AntPool 和 ViaBTC 的块。

items.title: Bitcoin holds above $70,000, but future direction hinges on Iran-U.S. 'talks'
items.summary: Cryptos bounced on Trump’s five-day pause announcement, but the next move hinges on whether tensions between the U.S. and Iran ease or spiral, a Wintermute trader said.
items.title_zh: 比特币维持在 70,000 美元以上，但未来方向取决于伊朗和美国'会谈'
items.summary_zh: 一位 Wintermute 交易员表示，加密货币因特朗普宣布暂停五天而反弹，但下一步走势取决于美国和伊朗之间的紧张局势是缓解还是加剧。

items.title: Creating with Sora Safely
items.summary: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.
items.title_zh: 与 Sora 一起安全地创作
items.summary_zh: 为了解决最先进的视频模型和新的社交创作平台带来的新的安全挑战，我们构建了以安全为基础的 Sora 2 和 Sora 应用程序。我们的方法以具体的保护为基础。

items.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
items.summary: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.
items.title_zh: Wayfair 通过 OpenAI 提高目录准确性和支持速度
items.summary_zh: Wayfair 使用 OpenAI 模型来改善电子商务支持和产品目录准确性，自动进行票证分类并大规模增强数百万个产品属性。

items.title: Build a Domain-Specific Embedding Model in Under a Day
items.title_zh: 在一天之内构建特定领域的嵌入模型

items.title: How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation
items.summary: An overview of SpeciesNet, our open-source AI model that is helping people around the world protect and conserve wildlife.
items.title_zh: 我们的开源人工智能模型 SpeciesNet 如何帮助促进野生动物保护
items.summary_zh: SpeciesNet 概述，我们的开源人工智能模型正在帮助世界各地的人们保护野生动物。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in February
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from February 2026
items.title_zh: 我们二月份公布的最新人工智能新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 2 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite：专为大规模智能而打造
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite 是我们迄今为止速度最快、最具成本效益的 Gemini 3 系列型号。

items.title: Advancing international trade research and finding community
items.summary: Sojun Park, a postdoc at the Center for International Studies, has learned much from his research on intellectual property as well as his interactions with students and mentors at MIT.
items.title_zh: 推进国际贸易研究和寻找社区
items.summary_zh: Sojun Park 是国际研究中心的博士后，他从知识产权研究以及与麻省理工学院学生和导师的互动中学到了很多东西。

items.title: On algorithms, life, and learning
items.summary: Operations research expert Dimitris Bertsimas delivered the annual Killian Lecture, providing a look at the past and future of his work.
items.title_zh: 论算法、生活、学习
items.summary_zh: 运筹学专家 Dimitris Bertsimas 发表了年度基利安讲座，回顾了他工作的过去和未来。

items.title: A better method for identifying overconfident large language models
items.summary: This new metric for measuring uncertainty could flag hallucinations and help users know whether to trust an AI model.
items.title_zh: 识别过度自信的大型语言模型的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 这种测量不确定性的新指标可以标记幻觉，并帮助用户知道是否信任人工智能模型。

items.title: MIT-IBM Watson AI Lab seed to signal: Amplifying early-career faculty impact
items.summary: Academia-industry relationship is an early-stage accelerator, supporting professional progress and research.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM Watson AI 实验室种子信号：扩大早期职业教师的影响力
items.summary_zh: 学术界与工业界的关系是早期加速器，支持专业进步和研究。

items.title: U.S. executives, from Apple to Eli Lilly, revamp their push into the world's second-largest economy at the China Development Forum
items.summary: More than 80 global executives traveled to Beijing this weekend for the state-organized China Development Forum.
items.title_zh: 从苹果公司到礼来公司等美国高管在中国发展高层论坛上调整了进军世界第二大经济体的计划
items.summary_zh: 本周末，80 多名全球高管前往北京参加国家组织的中国发展论坛。

items.title: Small cap-focused Russell 2000 becomes first U.S. benchmark to enter correction territory
items.summary: Small caps are especially sensitive to changes in oil prices and a slowdown in the economic cycle.
items.title_zh: 以小盘股为主的罗素 2000 指数成为首个进入调整区间的美国基准指数
items.summary_zh: 小盘股对油价变化和经济周期放缓尤其敏感。

items.title: OpenClaw demand in China is driving up the price of used MacBooks
items.summary: People in China are rushing to buy preowned computers to try OpenClaw with demand for MacBooks particularly high, according to one reseller.
items.title_zh: 中国的 OpenClaw 需求正在推高二手 MacBook 的价格
items.summary_zh: 据一位经销商称，中国人正争相购买二手电脑来尝试 OpenClaw，其中对 MacBook 的需求特别高。

items.title: 'Like the plane got cut in half': LaGuardia crash that killed two pilots now under investigation
items.summary: In the aftermath of the collision of Air Canada flight AC8646 with a fire truck in New York, US transportation chief Sean Duffy emphasized that seat belts helped save lives
items.title_zh: “就像飞机被切成两半”：导致两名飞行员死亡的拉瓜迪亚空难目前正在调查中
items.summary_zh: 加拿大航空 AC8646 航班在纽约与消防车相撞后，美国交通部部长肖恩·达菲 (Sean Duffy) 强调安全带有助于拯救生命

items.title: Inside the alleged Russian operation to trigger anti-government protests in Angola
items.summary: A group of Russians and Angolans are going on trial in Angola after being accused of fomenting protests, which they deny.
items.title_zh: 涉嫌俄罗斯在安哥拉引发反政府抗议活动的内部情况
items.summary_zh: 一群俄罗斯人和安哥拉人被指控煽动抗议活动，目前正在安哥拉接受审判，但他们否认这一点。

items.title: Colombian military plane crash kills at least 66
items.summary: Colombia's defence minister says it was a "tragic accident" but the cause is not yet clear.
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚军机失事造成至少66人死亡
items.summary_zh: 哥伦比亚国防部长称这是一起“悲惨事故”，但原因尚不清楚。

items.title: China dials back on fuel price hikes to 'reduce burden' on drivers
items.summary: It comes as countries across the region are taking various measures to weather the soaring cost of fuel.
items.title_zh: 中国减少燃油价格上涨以“减轻司机负担”
items.summary_zh: 与此同时，该地区各国正在采取各种措施来应对不断飙升的燃料成本。

items.title: More Australian beef headed for Europe under new EU trade deal
items.summary: Australian producers have also won the right to sell Italian-style sparkling wine as prosecco.
items.title_zh: 根据新的欧盟贸易协议，更多澳大利亚牛肉运往欧洲
items.summary_zh: 澳大利亚生产商还赢得了以普罗塞克为名销售意大利风格起泡酒的权利。

items.title: Jury orders Cosby to pay $19m to ex-waitress after finding he abused her in 1972
items.summary: Donna Motsinger alleged Cosby gave her wine and a pill that left her incapacitated after picking her up in a limousine in 1972.
items.title_zh: 陪审团发现科斯比在 1972 年虐待前女服务员后，命令科斯比向她支付 1900 万美元
items.summary_zh: 唐娜·莫辛格 (Donna Motsinger) 声称，科斯比 1972 年用豪华轿车接她后，给了她酒和药片，导致她丧失行为能力。

items.title: Referendum defeat leaves Italy's Meloni looking more vulnerable
items.summary: Meloni vowed to press on after losing a vote on constitutional reform many turned into a referendum on her government.
items.title_zh: 公投失败让意大利的梅洛尼看起来更加脆弱
items.summary_zh: 梅洛尼在宪法改革投票失败后发誓要继续前进，许多投票都变成了对她的政府的全民公投。

items.title: Slovenia becomes first EU country to introduce fuel rationing
items.summary: Until further notice, motorists in Slovenia will be restricted to a maximum purchase of 50 litres of fuel per day.
items.title_zh: 斯洛文尼亚成为第一个实行燃油配给的欧盟国家
items.summary_zh: 在另行通知之前，斯洛文尼亚的驾车者每天最多购买 50 升燃油。

items.title: U.S. and Iran Send Conflicting Signals on Peace Prospects
items.summary: President Trump said talks were underway. A top Iranian official denied that, while other Iranians said messages were being traded through intermediaries.
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗就和平前景发出相互矛盾的信号
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统表示谈判正在进行中。一名伊朗高级官员否认了这一点，而其他伊朗人则表示信息是通过中间人进行交易的。

items.title: Canada’s Military Wants to Prove It Can Defend the High Arctic
items.summary: Canadian soldiers transported M777 howitzers to the High Arctic to show their ability to fight in an increasingly contested part of the world. It did not go as planned.
items.title_zh: 加拿大军方希望证明自己能够保卫北极地区
items.summary_zh: 加拿大士兵将 M777 榴弹炮运送到北极，以展示他们在世界上竞争日益激烈的地区作战的能力。事情没有按计划进行。

items.title: A Choice of Deadly Drones Is Only a Few Clicks Away for Ukrainian Troops
items.summary: Ukraine has created online marketplaces to let units select their own drones, a break from generations of standardized and centralized weapons procurement.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰军队只需点击几下鼠标即可选择致命的无人机
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰创建了在线市场，让部队选择自己的无人机，打破了几代标准化和集中式武器采购的做法。

items.title: Why the BTS Comeback Concert Was a ‘Disaster’ for Some Businesses
items.summary: The turnout for the K-pop titans’ show was much lower than projected by officials, hitting the bottom line of some restaurants. Shares in the group’s management company also fell.
items.title_zh: 为什么 BTS 复出演唱会对一些企业来说是一场“灾难”
items.summary_zh: 韩国流行音乐巨星演出的出席人数远低于官方预期，触及一些餐厅的底线。该集团管理公司的股价也下跌。

items.title: Italians Reject Judicial Overhaul, Undermining Meloni
items.summary: Some 54 percent of voters spurned a government plan to change how jurists are supervised. It presented Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni with her biggest domestic challenge since her election in 2022.
items.title_zh: 意大利人拒绝司法改革，损害了梅洛尼的利益
items.summary_zh: 约 54% 的选民拒绝接受政府改变法学家监督方式的计划。这给总理乔治亚·梅洛尼带来了自 2022 年当选以来最大的国内挑战。

items.title: Taiwan Debates Military Spending as Choices Over U.S. and China Loom
items.summary: Tensions in the opposition Nationalist Party could surface this week as lawmakers argue over additional defense funding intended to counter Beijing’s growing might.
items.title_zh: 台湾就军费展开争论，美国和中国之间的选择迫在眉睫
items.summary_zh: 由于议员们就旨在对抗北京日益增长的实力的额外国防资金问题展开争论，反对党国民党内部的紧张局势可能会在本周浮出水面。

items.title: Colombian Military Plane Crash Kills 66 and Injures Dozens
items.summary: A military aircraft transporting 128 people was involved in an accident as it took off from southern Colombia, according to the authorities.
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚军用飞机失事造成66人死亡、数十人受伤
items.summary_zh: 当局称，一架载有128人的军用飞机从哥伦比亚南部起飞时发生事故。

items.title: In Denmark’s Election, How Will the Woman Who Took On Trump Fare?
items.summary: Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen is the biggest force this country has seen in decades. The crisis in Greenland has energized her, but are voters itching for change?
items.title_zh: 丹麦大选中，挑战特朗普的女性将表现如何？
items.summary_zh: 总理梅特·弗雷德里克森是这个国家几十年来最强大的力量。格陵兰岛的危机让她充满活力，但选民是否渴望变革？

items.title: Solana Foundation targets institutions with new privacy framework
items.summary: The organization argued that the next phase of crypto adoption will depend less on transparency alone and more on giving companies control over what they reveal — and to whom.
items.title_zh: Solana 基金会针对机构推出新的隐私框架
items.summary_zh: 该组织认为，加密货币采用的下一阶段将不再仅仅依赖于透明度，而更多地依赖于让公司控制他们所披露的内容以及向谁披露。

items.title: Prediction market boom spurs new VC fund backed by Polymarket, Kalshi CEOs
items.summary: The fund, called 5c(c) Capital, is aiming to raise $35 million to fund startups tied to the rapid growth of event-based trading markets.
items.title_zh: 预测市场繁荣刺激了 Polymarket 和 Kalshi 首席执行官支持的新风险投资基金
items.summary_zh: 该基金名为 5c(c) Capital，旨在筹集 3500 万美元，为与基于事件的交易市场快速增长相关的初创公司提供资金。

items.title: BlackRock is betting billions that tokenized funds will do for Wall Street what the internet did to mail
items.summary: In his annual letter, BlackRock CEO Larry Fink argues that digital wallets and tokenized assets could modernize markets and expand investor access.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德押注数十亿美元，相信代币化基金将为华尔街带来就像互联网对邮寄的影响一样
items.summary_zh: 贝莱德首席执行官拉里·芬克在年度信中指出，数字钱包和代币化资产可以实现市场现代化并扩大投资者的准入范围。

items.title: Circle urges EU to fast-track DLT reforms, widen stablecoin settlement rules
items.summary: Circle's response leans into interoperability, hinting that EU markets may need to accommodate non-euro stablecoins to stay competitive.
items.title_zh: Circle敦促欧盟加快DLT改革，扩大稳定币结算规则
items.summary_zh: Circle 的回应倾向于互操作性，暗示欧盟市场可能需要容纳非欧元稳定币以保持竞争力。

items.title: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink sees tokenization making investing with your phone as easy as payments
items.summary: Fink's comments come as Congress and regulators explore how tokenization — using blockchain technology — could improve markets.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德首席执行官拉里·芬克 (Larry Fink) 认为代币化使手机投资变得像付款一样简单
items.summary_zh: 芬克发表此番言论之际，国会和监管机构正在探索使用区块链技术的代币化如何改善市场。

items.title: Mizuho slashes Gemini price target by more than half as weaker trading outweighs card growth
items.summary: The price target cut reflects both weaker trading assumptions and a broader compression in exchange valuation multiples.
items.title_zh: 由于交易疲软超过信用卡增长，瑞穗将 Gemini 目标价格削减一半以上
items.summary_zh: 价格目标下调反映了交易假设的减弱和交易所估值倍数的更广泛压缩。

items.title: How we monitor internal coding agents for misalignment
items.summary: How OpenAI uses chain-of-thought monitoring to study misalignment in internal coding agents—analyzing real-world deployments to detect risks and strengthen AI safety safeguards.
items.title_zh: 我们如何监控内部编码代理的错位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用思想链监控来研究内部编码代理的错位——分析现实世界的部署以检测风险并加强人工智能安全保障。

items.title: OpenAI Japan announces Japan Teen Safety Blueprint to put teen safety first
items.summary: OpenAI Japan announces the Japan Teen Safety Blueprint, introducing stronger age protections, parental controls, and well-being safeguards for teens using generative AI.
items.title_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布日本青少年安全蓝图，将青少年安全放在首位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布了日本青少年安全蓝图，为使用生成人工智能的青少年引入了更强有力的年龄保护、家长控制和福祉保障。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
items.summary: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API and sub-agent workloads.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 简介
items.summary_zh: GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 是 GPT-5.4 的更小、更快的版本，针对编码、工具使用、多模式推理以及大容量 API 和子代理工作负载进行了优化。

items.title: Why Codex Security Doesn’t Include a SAST Report
items.summary: A deep dive into why Codex Security doesn’t rely on traditional SAST, instead using AI-driven constraint reasoning and validation to find real vulnerabilities with fewer false positives.
items.title_zh: 为什么 Codex 安全性不包括 SAST 报告
items.summary_zh: 深入探讨为什么 Codex Security 不依赖传统的 SAST，而是使用人工智能驱动的约束推理和验证来发现真正的漏洞，并减少误报。

items.title: Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection
items.summary: How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows.
items.title_zh: 设计人工智能代理以抵抗即时注入
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 如何通过限制危险行为和保护代理工作流程中的敏感数据来防御即时注入和社会工程。

items.title: A New Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents (EVA)
items.title_zh: 评估语音代理 (EVA) 的新框架

items.title: What's New in Mellea 0.4.0 + Granite Libraries Release
items.title_zh: Mellea 0.4.0 + Granite 库版本的新增功能

items.title: State of Open Source on Hugging Face: Spring 2026
items.title_zh: 拥抱开源的现状：2026 年春季

items.title: Holotron-12B - High Throughput Computer Use Agent
items.title_zh: Holotron-12B - 高吞吐量计算机使用代理

items.title: Introducing Storage Buckets on the Hugging Face Hub
items.title_zh: Hugging Face Hub 上引入存储桶

items.title: Keep the Tokens Flowing: Lessons from 16 Open-Source RL Libraries
items.title_zh: 保持代币流动：来自 16 个开源 RL 库的经验教训

items.title: Ulysses Sequence Parallelism: Training with Million-Token Contexts
items.title_zh: Ulysses 序列并行性：使用百万令牌上下文进行训练

items.title: LeRobot v0.5.0: Scaling Every Dimension
items.title_zh: 乐机器人 v0.5.0：扩展各个维度

items.title: Bringing Robotics AI to Embedded Platforms: Dataset Recording, VLA Fine‑Tuning, and On‑Device Optimizations
items.title_zh: 将机器人人工智能引入嵌入式平台：数据集记录、VLA 微调和设备上优化

items.title: Bringing the power of Personal Intelligence to more people
items.summary: We're expanding Personal Intelligence across AI Mode in Search, the Gemini app and Gemini in Chrome.
items.title_zh: 将个人智能的力量带给更多人
items.summary_zh: 我们正在将个人智能扩展到搜索中的 AI 模式、Gemini 应用程序和 Chrome 中的 Gemini。

items.title: Our latest investment in open source security for the AI era
items.summary: Google is making new investments, building new tools and developing code security to improve open source security.
items.title_zh: 我们对人工智能时代开源安全的最新投资
items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在进行新的投资、构建新的工具并开发代码安全性，以提高开源安全性。

items.title: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia
items.summary: A new Google AI initiative aims to improve heart health outcomes for people living in remote Australian communities.
items.title_zh: 人工智能如何帮助改善澳大利亚农村地区的心脏健康
items.summary_zh: 一项新的谷歌人工智能计划旨在改善生活在澳大利亚偏远社区的人们的心脏健康状况。

items.title: Gemini in Google Sheets just achieved state-of-the-art performance.
items.summary: Today we announced new beta features for Gemini in Sheets to help you create, organize and edit entire sheets, from basic tasks to complex data analysis — just describe …
items.title_zh: Google Sheets 中的 Gemini 刚刚实现了最先进的性能。
items.summary_zh: 今天，我们宣布了 Gemini in Sheets 的新测试版功能，可帮助您创建、组织和编辑整个工作表，从基本任务到复杂的数据分析 - 只需描述......

items.title: Ask a Techspert: How does AI understand my visual searches?
items.summary: Learn more about AI Mode in Search’s query fan-out method for visual search.
items.title_zh: 询问技术专家：人工智能如何理解我的视觉搜索？
items.summary_zh: 详细了解搜索中用于视觉搜索的 AI 模式的查询扇出方法。

items.title: Use Canvas in AI Mode to get things done and bring your ideas to life, right in Search.
items.summary: Canvas in AI Mode is now available for everyone in the U.S. Plus, it can now help you draft documents or build interactive tools.
items.title_zh: 在 AI 模式下使用 Canvas 即可在搜索中完成工作并将您的想法变为现实。
items.summary_zh: AI 模式下的 Canvas 现已可供美国所有人使用，此外，它现在还可以帮助您起草文档或构建交互式工具。

items.title: Create new worlds in Project Genie with these 4 tips
items.summary: Learn more about Google DeepMind’s Project Genie and how to write prompts to create your own worlds.
items.title_zh: 利用这 4 个技巧在 Project Genie 中创建新世界
items.summary_zh: 详细了解 Google DeepMind 的 Project Genie 以及如何编写提示来创建您自己的世界。

items.title: How to create “humble” AI
items.summary: An MIT-led team is designing artificial intelligence systems for medical diagnosis that are more collaborative and forthcoming about uncertainty.
items.title_zh: 如何创造“谦逊”的人工智能
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院领导的团队正在设计用于医疗诊断的人工智能系统，该系统对于不确定性更具协作性和主动性。

items.title: What’s the right path for AI?
items.summary: Conference speakers discussed the unfolding trajectory of AI and the benefits of shaping technology to meet people’s needs.
items.title_zh: AI的正确道路是什么？
items.summary_zh: 会议发言人讨论了人工智能的发展轨迹以及塑造技术以满足人们需求的好处。

items.title: Sustaining diplomacy amid competition in US-China relations
items.summary: At MIT, former U.S. ambassador to China Nicholas Burns highlights climate change as an area for diplomatic engagement, while exploring areas including China's emphasis on STEM education.
items.title_zh: 中美关系竞争中的可持续外交
items.summary_zh: 在麻省理工学院，前美国驻华大使尼古拉斯·伯恩斯强调气候变化是外交接触的一个领域，同时探讨了包括中国对 STEM 教育的重视等领域。
